description: Template for kava bar culture, social scenes, relaxation vibes

data.label: Style
data.name: Comic Ink + Warm Gathering
data.description: Heavy ink illustration. Bold black outlines, high contrast chiaroscuro with deep blacks and warm amber highlights. Cel-shaded shadows, graphic shapes. Warm ochre and earth tones with soft glow accents. Hand-drawn comic book aesthetic with relaxed, communal energy. Influenced by Dave McKean and Moebius. NOT photorealistic. Edge-to-edge composition.

data.label: Setting
data.description: Intimate kava bar interior with low lighting, wooden bowls, tropical plants, comfortable seating areas
